_comment: Bridge from requirement IDs to the tests that prove them. STATUS.md is generated from this file plus each package's test-results.json by scripts/verify-status.mjs. For auto* types, testMatch is an array of matchers; a matcher hits a test when BOTH its 'file' and 'name' substrings appear (file in the suite path, name in the test's full name). Matchers are OR'd. Nothing is implemented yet, so every auto* row currently reports 'No matching test' until its test exists.

requirements.verify: OAuth flow exchanges code for tokens and persists them; manual check of the real Google consent screen.
First sync imports all events from the chosen calendar into the DB.
Incremental sync applies Google changes using a stored sync token.
Local create/edit produces the correct Google API write payload.
Conflicting edits resolve to the newer updatedAt (last-write-wins).
Recurring events expand to occurrences for display; edits to recurrence are rejected.
Event CRUD endpoints behave and scope to the single user.
Event type is stored and validated (meeting | block).
Admin interactive week calendar: occurrence→event mapping (recurring locked), selection→editor draft, and move/resize→patch with a min-duration guard; drag/click/move/resize reviewed live.
Deleting an event confirms first: dialog copy names the target and offers Delete; cancel path leaves the event intact (reviewed live).
Weekly view groups events into the correct day/time slots.
Manually verify portrait and landscape layouts on the 15.6" screen.
A data change emits a WebSocket message the display consumes.
Project CRUD endpoints behave.
Deleting a project confirms first and the dialog states its to-dos go with it; cancel path leaves it intact (reviewed live).
Todo CRUD with status, scoped to a project.
surfaceTodos(now, events, todos) returns a project's open todos only inside a linked block.
Deleting a to-do confirms first; cancel path leaves it intact (reviewed live).
Absolute-time reminder schedules a fire at the right instant.
Relative reminder/timer computes the correct fire time from now.
Recurring reminder computes the next occurrence after firing.
Fire event triggers a display takeover payload (and optional chime flag).
Note CRUD, general or linked to a project.
Deleting a note confirms first; cancel path leaves it intact (reviewed live).
Day and month view builders produce correct buckets; active view switch propagates.
With Google unreachable, reads/writes still succeed against the local DB.
Confirm admin is bound to the Tailscale interface and no public port is exposed; no login by design in v1.
Manually time an admin change appearing on the display (target ~1s).
core has no imports of node clock/IO/DB modules (purity guard test).
